raw_text.question: Classify these as faster or slower than driving a car: running, flying a plane, riding a bike, walking, driving a boat.
raw_text.response: Okay, so we are looking at a text classification problem where we need to figure out whether certain things are faster or slower than driving a car. I'm going to assume that the car is being driven on a US highway at like 60 miles per hour. So running is definitely slower. Flying a plane is definitely faster. riding a bike usually is slower walking is definitely slower and driving a boat well i don't know how fast boats go so i'm going to look that up so speed boats high performance speed boats can go up to 40 to 60 miles per hour but usually they're slower so i'm going to say that overall it is slower
